title: Trim 09-execute-projects.md to under 4000 words
description: Trim the single largest pipeline doc in-place. Same structure, tighter prose. Wave algorithm compressed inline. All critical enforcement content preserved.

scope.in: Edit 09-execute-projects.md to reduce word count from ~6222 to under 4000. Remove redundant restatements, consolidate duplicates, replace verbose prose with bullets. Compress wave algorithm inline (do not extract to new file). Promote buried instructions.
scope.out: Creating new files. Splitting into multiple files. Removing unique enforcement content. Changing the section structure.

dod.criterion: All unique enforcement instructions preserved (project.json update, review verification, code-review blocking)
Wave algorithm still present inline (compressed, not removed)
Smoke test: validate-project-json.sh runs successfully against an existing completed directive

tasks.title: Remove redundant restatements and consolidate duplicates
tasks.user_scenario: Agents reading 09-execute-projects.md encounter each instruction once, not repeated across sections.
tasks.scope: Identify and remove content in 09-execute-projects.md that restates rules already covered in reference docs (phase-definitions.md, casting-rules.md, scope-and-dod.md). Consolidate duplicate instruction blocks within the doc. Replace verbose prose with concise bullet points. Do NOT remove unique enforcement content.

dod.criterion: No instruction appears twice in the doc
References to detailed rules point to reference docs instead of restating them
Word count reduced by at least 1500 words from this task alone

tasks.title: Compress wave algorithm and finalize under 4000 words
tasks.user_scenario: Agents get the wave computation logic in a compact form without losing the algorithm.
tasks.scope: Compress the wave algorithm pseudocode section (~900 words) to under 400 words. Keep the algorithm logic, remove verbose comments and examples. Ensure total doc is under 4000 words. Run validate-project-json.sh against .context/directives/agent-identity-extraction-layer as smoke test.

dod.criterion: Wave algorithm section is under 400 words
validate-project-json.sh passes against an existing completed directive
